description: Letter (right half) from Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi to a Kohen whose father is named Yehuda. The upper half consists of praises and blessings for the recipient and his son. Moshe then requests urgently that he send him wages or payment of some kind. In the margin he apologizes for his handwriting and style, because he wrote it in a hurry by the light of a lamp. ASE.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
